goals: Look up relevant formulas for cinema projection calculations (screen size, throw distance, aspect ratios)
Convert film measurement units between metric and imperial systems for different film gauges
Solve a specific projection calculation problem using the obtained formulas and conversions

user_agent_config.personality: Practical and hands-on, prefers getting straight to the numbers rather than lengthy explanations. Curious about technical details but not formally trained in advanced mathematics.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows film projection equipment and vintage cinema well, understands basic arithmetic, but is unfamiliar with complex formulas and unit conversions needed for precise technical calculations.

end_condition: The user has obtained the necessary formulas, completed the unit conversions, and solved the specific projection calculation needed for their work.
